goal: Verify and complete the Aegis-Sign reactive microservice, addressing the pending integration tests by removing Docker dependencies and ensuring full compliance with KYC and PAdES requirements.

tasks.title: Audit Implementation and Run Unit Tests
tasks.description: Analyze the codebase in 'src/main/java' to confirm implementation of RF-KYC and RF-SIG requirements. Execute 'mvn test' to verify the 17 existing unit tests and ArchUnit tests. Capture and review results from 'target/surefire-reports'.

tasks.title: Add Embedded Test Dependencies
tasks.description: Modify 'pom.xml' to include embedded alternatives for infrastructure components: 'it.antonio-vittorio:embedded-redis' for Redis and an S3/MinIO mock (e.g., 'com.adobe.testing:s3mock-junit5'). Ensure 'h2' is available for R2DBC testing to bypass the need for a local Docker daemon.

tasks.title: Refactor Integration Test Infrastructure
tasks.description: Modify 'src/test/java/com/aegis/sign/AbstractIntegrationTest.java' to remove '@Testcontainers' and '@Container' definitions. Implement manual startup/shutdown for embedded Redis and S3 mocks in '@BeforeAll' and '@AfterAll'. Update Spring context configuration to use H2 (r2dbc:h2:mem) for PostgreSQL testing.

tasks.title: Execute and Fix Integration Tests
tasks.description: Run 'mvn test -Dtest=SignatureControllerIntegrationTest' and address any failures. Ensure the full E2E flow (Contract Prepare -> Hash -> Sign) works using the embedded infrastructure. Verify that PAdES signatures are correctly applied to the generated PDFs.

tasks.title: Verify Security and PII Purge Logic
tasks.description: Examine 'KycSession' management and storage services to verify RNF-04 (PII purge after 7 days) and RNF-03 (AES-256 encryption). If not already present, create a test in 'src/test/java/com/aegis/sign/domain/service/' to verify the expiration/purge logic for biometric data.

tasks.title: Verify Idempotency and Rate Limiting
tasks.description: Review 'infrastructure/adapter/web/' for implementation of 'Idempotency-Key' (3.1) and Redis-based rate limiting (3.2). Perform a final check of the OpenAPI spec generation to ensure all endpoints are correctly documented as per RF-4.3.
